emails.body:
Team,

Monday battle rhythm:
- 0830: Ops sync (VTC)
- 1000: J3/J5 coordination on exercise planning
- 1300: ATaS validation working group
- 1500: Senate brief prep with COL Abreu

No significant changes to watch floor. Standby for FRAGO on weekend manning.

V/r
JIAITF Ops

Ops,

Tuesday rhythm:
- 0730: Shift turnover complete
- 0900: ATaS error model review — tracking toward 1% threshold
- 1100: Staff call with J2 on collection gaps
- 1400: Deck review for Thursday Senate brief (v17 baseline)

No watch issues overnight. Will push updated rollup by 1600.

Maddox

Ops,

Wednesday battle rhythm:
- 0800: Commander's update brief
- 1030: ATaS validation — model holding at 1.2%, trending down
- 1300: Lunch with Hill liaison (tentative)
- 1500: Talking points sync with Maddox for Senate brief

Weekend coverage roster attached for review. Abreu

All,

Thursday rhythm:
- 0700: Early rollup — ATaS validation on track for Friday delivery
- 0900: Senate brief rehearsal (COL Abreu lead)
- 1100: J3/J5 exercise design review
- 1400: Open slot — hold for validation contingencies

Watch floor nominal. FRAGO on weekend manning forthcoming.

JIAITF Ops

Ops,

Friday closeout:
- Validation package compiled from v17 — error model at 0.98%
- Senate brief deck finalized (v13 for staff, v17 for record)
- Weekend watch: LT Stix on Saturday, LT Chen Sunday
- Handoff notes uploaded to share drive

No open action items. See you Monday.

Maddox

Ops,

Weekend coverage confirmed:
- Sat: LT Stix (0600-1800), backup LT Chen
- Sun: LT Chen (0600-1800), backup LT Stix
- Mon 0600: Normal rotation resumes

Talking points for Senate brief are in the shared folder — using the version from last week's rehearsal. No changes needed.

Abreu

Team,

Sunday update — quiet weekend on watch floor. No incidents.

Monday look-ahead:
- 0700: Maddox rollup
- 0830: Ops sync
- 1000: ATaS validation handoff to test team
- 1300: After-action on Senate brief

Ops drive updated with weekend logs. V/r
JIAITF Ops

Ops,

Monday 0700 rollup:
- Watch: clean turnover, no incidents
- ATaS: validation package delivered to test team Friday; awaiting feedback
- Senate brief: completed Thursday, positive reception per Hill liaison
- Deck: sent v13 to Stix for staff prep (slide count 18)

Tracking one open item: test team ETA on validation review. Will update by 0900.

Maddox

Ops,

Staff sync reminder — 0830 today in VTC Room 2.

Agenda:
1. ATaS test team feedback (pending)
2. Exercise planning timeline
3. Weekend manning AAR
4. Open floor

Using last week's talking points for any ATaS questions. Abreu
